calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Edward Ritger and Suzanne McClellan appeared in person (pro per) (petitioner).
Michael Kirby appeared via zoom (pro per).

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 12, 1996 is admitted to probate. Edward Ritger is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for November 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS
